name: Gearfried the Red-Eyes Iron Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真紅眼の鉄騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レッドアイズ・メタルナイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ギア・フリード
desc: Once per turn, if either player equips an Equip Card(s) to this card: You can destroy those Equip Cards, then you can destroy 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls. Once per turn: You can send 1 Equip Card you control that is equipped to this card to the GY, then target 1 Level 7 or lower "Red-Eyes" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if either player equips an Equip Card(s) to this card: You can destroy those Equip Cards, then you can destroy 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls. Once per turn: You can send 1 Equip Card you control that is equipped to this card to the GY, then target 1 Level 7 or lower "Red-Eyes" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
